feeds.title: 60-Second Science
feeds.description: Tune in every weekday for quick reports and commentaries on the world of science—it'll just take a minute

feeds.title: Discovery
feeds.description: Explorations in the world of science.

feeds.title: FlowingData
feeds.description: Strength in Numbers

feeds.title: Gizmodo
feeds.description: We come from the future

feeds.title: Hidden Brain
feeds.description: Shankar Vedantam uses science and storytelling to reveal the unconscious patterns that drive human behavior, shape our choices and direct our relationships.

feeds.title: Invisibilia
feeds.description: Unseeable forces control human behavior and shape our ideas, beliefs, and assumptions. Invisibilia—Latin for invisible things—fuses narrative storytelling with science that will make you see your own life differently.

feeds.title: Nature
feeds.description: Nature is the foremost international weekly scientific journal in the world and is the flagship journal for Nature Portfolio. It publishes the finest peer-reviewed research in all fields of science and technology on the basis of its originality, importance, interdisciplinary interest, timeliness, accessibility, elegance and surprising conclusions. Nature publishes landmark papers, award winning news, leading comment and expert opinion on important, topical scientific news and events that enable readers to share the latest discoveries in science and evolve the discussion amongst the global scientific community

feeds.title: Phys.org - latest science and technology news stories
feeds.text: Phys.org - latest science and technology news stories
feeds.description: Phys.org internet news portal provides the latest news on science including: Physics, Nanotechnology, Life Sciences, Space Science, Earth Science, Environment, Health and Medicine.

feeds.title: Probably Science
feeds.description: Professional comedians with so-so STEM pedigrees take you through this week in science. Incompetently. Featuring hosts Matt Kirshen, Andy Wood (and sometimes Jesse Case or Brooks Wheelan) along with a rotating cast of special guests from the worlds of comedy and science.

feeds.title: Radiolab
feeds.description: Radiolab is one of the most beloved podcasts and public radio shows in the world. The show is known for its deep-dive journalism and innovative sound design. Created in 2002 by host Jad Abumrad, the program began as an exploration of scientific inquiry. Over the years it has evolved to become a platform for long-form journalism and storytelling. Radiolab is co-hosted by Lulu Miller and Latif Nasser.

feeds.title: Reddit Science
feeds.description: This community is a place to share and discuss new scientific research. Read about the latest advances in astronomy, biology, medicine, physics, social science, and more. Find and submit new publications and popular science coverage of current research.

feeds.title: Sawbones: A Marital Tour of Misguided Medicine
feeds.text: Sawbones: A Marital Tour of Misguided Medicine
feeds.description: Join Dr. Sydnee McElroy and her husband Justin McElroy for a tour of all the dumb, bad, gross, weird and wrong ways we've tried to fix people.

feeds.title: Science Latest
feeds.description: Channel Description

feeds.title: Science Vs
feeds.description: There are a lot of fads, blogs and strong opinions, but then there’s SCIENCE. Science Vs is the show from Gimlet that finds out what’s fact, what’s not, and what’s somewhere in between. We do the hard work of sifting through all the science so you don't have to and cover everything from 5G and Pandemics, to Vaping and Fasting Diets.

feeds.title: Science-Based Medicine
feeds.description: Exploring issues and controversies in the relationship between science and medicine

feeds.title: Scientific American Content: Global
feeds.description: Science news and technology updates from Scientific American

feeds.title: Shirtloads of Science
feeds.description: Dr Karl’s a curious optimist – a great combination for a science lover. Join him and his guests for weird facts, amazing conversation and remember, it’s never too late for a happy childhood. https://drkarl.com/

feeds.title: TED Talks Daily (SD video)
feeds.description: TED is a nonprofit devoted to ideas worth spreading. On this video feed, you'll find TED Talks to inspire, intrigue and stir the imagination from some of the world's leading thinkers and doers, speaking from the stage at TED conferences, TEDx events and partner events around the world. This podcast is also available in high-def video and audio-only formats.

feeds.title: The Infinite Monkey Cage
feeds.description: Witty, irreverent look at the world through scientists' eyes. With Brian Cox and Robin Ince.

feeds.title: This Week in Science – The Kickass Science Podcast
feeds.text: This Week in Science – The Kickass Science Podcast
feeds.description: The kickass science and technology radio show that delivers an irreverent look at the week in science and technology.
